parameters.query: SELECT id, store_name, agent_name, brand_tone, escalation_email FROM store_profiles WHERE id = '{{ $json.store_id }}' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1;

SELECT agent_name, brand_voice, custom_greeting, fallback_message, escalation_info, upsell_enabled, top_k_retrieval, similarity_threshold FROM ai_configurations WHERE store_id = '{{ $json.store_id }}' LIMIT 1;

=INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, store_id, role, content, retrieved_chunk_ids) VALUES ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', '{{ $json.store_id }}', 'customer', {{ $json.user_message | toJSON }}, NULL), ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', '{{ $json.store_id }}', 'assistant', {{ $json.message | toJSON }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.chunk_ids) }}');
